tasks.subject: Task 1: Mount API Endpoints in gateway.py
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Register /me/agents/{agent_name}/team and /me/agents/{agent_name}/genome route handlers in FastAPI.

**Files:**
- Modify: packages/agentdex_arena/src/agentdex_arena/gateway.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- GET /me/agents/{agent_name}/team returns the correct team/build identity payload.
- GET /me/agents/{agent_name}/genome acts as an alias to /me/agents/{agent_name}/team and returns compatible alias keys (genome_hash, genome_packed).

**Verify:** pytest packages/agentdex_arena/tests/test_me_dashboard.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/agentdex_arena/src/agentdex_arena/gateway.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest packages/agentdex_arena/tests/test_me_dashboard.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET /me/agents/{agent_name}/team works", "GET /me/agents/{agent_name}/genome works"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Implement Unit Tests in test_me_dashboard.py
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add test cases checking basic endpoints, mixed window flagging, quarantine retro-eligibility, and best-effort capture on error.

**Files:**
- Modify: packages/agentdex_arena/tests/test_me_dashboard.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Test details endpoint works for both /team and /genome.
- Test mixed_window flags true when multiple team hashes or uncaptured battles are registered.
- Test quarantine exclusion properly disregards quarantined battles.
- Test best-effort capture on error.

**Verify:** pytest packages/agentdex_arena/tests/test_me_dashboard.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/agentdex_arena/tests/test_me_dashboard.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest packages/agentdex_arena/tests/test_me_dashboard.py", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Basic team/genome detail tests pass", "Mixed window tests pass", "Quarantine tests pass", "Capture failure test passes"]}
```
